--- docs/onboarding.md
# Onboarding

Run onboarding in batch mode for the operations owner, processing the `new` queue before `retry` with up to three jobs in parallel:

```sh
onboarding run \
  --config config/onboarding.json \
  --mode batch \
  --max-parallel 3 \
  --owner operations \
  --queue new \
  --queue retry
```
